name: Aurora
bio:
Heavenly Light and Shadow Guardian whose life is bound to a Crystal Prism. Gained Light and Shadow Magic abilities to protect the world's light and harmony, becoming a Destroyer in the Spirit Heroes Faction.

Role: Magical AOE
Specialty: A mid-backline Breakthrough-type hero with certain damage output ability; can also provide buffs for allies.

skillSlots.name: Ultimate Flash
skillSlots.description: Attacks the enemy column with most units, dealing 200% M.DMG, ignoring 30% of target's DEF for this attack.

skillSlots.name: Retribution Ray
skillSlots.description: Attacks 4 random enemy targets, dealing 200% M.DMG and applying 1 stack of [Holy Seal].

effects.name: Opal Crystal
effects.description: When Aurora deals DMG, has 70% probability to inflict [Light Trace] on target.

effects.name: Opal Crystal
effects.description: When attacking enemies with [Light Trace], deals additional True DMG equal to 5% of target's Max HP (max 100% ATK).

effects.name: Opal Crystal
effects.description: [Ultimate Flash] deals additional 100% ATK as M.DMG to the first enemy and applies 1 additional stack of [Light Trace].

effects.name: Opal Crystal
effects.description: [Retribution Ray] deals additional 300% ATK as M.DMG, evenly split among all hit enemies.
